---
name: Physics question or challenge
about: Questions, challenges, or falsification attempts for the physics claim
title: "[Physics]"
labels: physics
assignees: ''
---

Reference
Please cite the exact version of the physics statement you are addressing
e.g. physics-statement-v1

Which part are you engaging
Claim
Assumption (specify A1–A6)
Falsification condition (specify F1–F5)
Worked implication

Content
State the physics question, objection, or counterexample clearly and concisely.
If applicable, indicate which assumption you believe fails and why.

Evidence
Experimental result
Theoretical construction
Calculation outline
Literature reference

Notes
This repository treats physics challenges as first class input.
Verifier or tooling comments are not required unless directly relevant.
